languages.text: "Нунциус не допустил меня к логам его когитатора. Нужна твоя санкция".
"Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус не допустил меня к логам его когитатора. Нужна твоя санкция".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."
"Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."

languages.text: «Nuncius no me concede acceso a los registros de su cogitador. Necesito su autorización».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius no me concede acceso a los registros de su cogitador. Necesito su autorización».

languages.text: “努恩修斯不肯让我查看他的沉思者日志。我需要你的授权。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯不肯让我查看他的沉思者日志。我需要你的授权。”

languages.text: « Nuncius n'a pas voulu me laisser accéder aux journaux de son cogitateur. J'ai besoin de votre autorisation. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius n'a pas voulu me laisser accéder aux journaux de son cogitateur. J'ai besoin de votre autorisation. »

languages.text: "Nuncius würde mit keinen Zugriff auf seine Cogitatorenprotokolle gewähren. Ich brauche Eure Autorisierung."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius würde mit keinen Zugriff auf seine Cogitatorenprotokolle gewähren. Ich brauche Eure Autorisierung."

languages.text: "ヌンシウスはコギテーター・ログへの アクセスを許可しなかったあなたの許可が必要です
languages.original_text: "Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."

languages.text: "Nuncius, kavramsayar kayıtlarına erişimime izin vermiyor. Bana yetki ver."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius would not grant me access to his cogitator logs. I require your authorisation."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, kavramsayar kayıtlarına erişimime izin vermiyor. Bana yetki ver."
